text:
Revenge Shop (しかえししょうてん, Shikaeshi Shōten) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game.

Transformation: 20
|
|-
!Card Effect:
|align=center colspan="3"|Report your grudges to the manager and he will retaliate for you in proportion to your grievance. Pay extra to request a more severe retaliation.
|
|-
!How to Obtain:
|align=center colspan="3"|(unknown)
|
|}

Summary

Revenge Shop (仕返し商店): This card when used summons a revenge shop. This shop allows for players to report any grudges you might have to the manager of the establishment. They will then use any means deemed necessary to retaliate back to whatever caused the grudge. The severity of the retaliation is determined by the level of grievance by the user. You can also pay extra for a more... severe attack.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.055 :: 仕返し商店 
店主に日頃の恨みを告白すれば、その程度に応じて恨んでいる相手に応酬してくれる。金額を上乗せすることで、より重い仕返しも可能。
|-
![Eng]
|No.055 :: Revenge Shop 
Confessing your resentment daily to the shopkeeper, will retaliate to the person who caused it depending on the degree. By setting forth some money, the action will be more severe.
|}
